title: Crumbly Midnight Greek Pastry Crumble
description: A rich and crumbly dessert featuring a low-carb-friendly puff pastry base with sautéed vegetables and cheese, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings.
instructions: In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add sliced zucchini to the skillet with onions. Season with salt and black pepper. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until tender but not mushy.
Roll out puff pastry sheet to a similar size as the vegetable mixture in the pan. Spread grated cheese evenly over one layer of rolled-out dough.
Fold the other half of the rolled-out dough onto the cheese and vegetables, pressing around edges with your fingers to seal tightly. Cut into wedges or circles for serving.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before slicing and serving.
